name: @metorial/leadboxer
description: Identify website visitors and enrich lead data with firmographic and behavioral intelligence. Retrieve and filter lists of identified leads, look up company information by IP address or domain, track server-side behavioral events, and enrich lead profiles with custom properties. Supports company identification from IP addresses (returning company name, industry, employee count, revenue, and location), domain-based data enrichment (returning technology stack, company size, and more), detailed session and event history retrieval for leads, and lead assignment to sales team members.
